subcodes.first_line: O thou who bearest the Most Great Name, my spirit be a sacrifice unto this noble Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمى اسم اعظم روحى فدا لهذا الاسم الکریم و النباء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
